llry , ,. .. ., '32 TERRELL G, WHITTTER
1377 YUKON
SUNNYVALE, CA,
TERRACE
94087-4413
29 April 
1992
Fair Political Practices Commi ss ion
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804
Attn:
Sirs:
Legal Division
I wish a written legal deternination on a question of conflict of
interest. 
I have asked our city attorney and was advised it
would be in ny best interests to have you make the determination'
I worked for Lockheed Missiles & Space Company, Inc. in
Sunnyvale, Calif. for alrnost 25 years and retired from this
conpany at this location on March 15, 1991.
I receive a monthly retirement check from the LOCXHEED
CORPORATION, Retirenent Plan Office, 4500 Park Granada Blvd',
Calabasas , CA 91399-0221 .
As far as I know, there is nothing I can do or say as a Planning
Connissioner for the City of Sunnyvale that can or wil} have an
effect on ny retirement payments.
Question: Is there a conflict of interest in sitting on the
Planning Commission for the City of Sunnyvale when the Lockheed
Missiles & Space Co., Inc. brings a rnatter before the commission?
During the tine I was working for the company I regularly stepped
down on matters pertaining to LMSC because they were ny employer'
I do not know if f should step down now that I no longer work for
this conpany .
S incerely ,
4o! 7rY-Llo/ 7
ry"-d4w"
